changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO supported_languages (id, iso_code, locale, name, charset) VALUES (4, 'lcd', 'lc_TEST', 'Test Codes', NULL);
ALTER SEQUENCE supported_languages_id_seq RESTART WITH 5;

rollback.sql:
DELETE FROM supported_languages WHERE id=4;
ALTER SEQUENCE supported_languages_id_seq RESTART WITH 4;
